description: Evaluator proposes an upgrade override (grade increase)
output: Override request with firm ID and proposed grade

description: System retrieves firm's latest financial data from database

System checks all 44 single-variable warning factors (fold 0 training-partition estimate). For each factor, firm value is compared to the distress tertile threshold. Source: NB03 Firth logistic regression (FDR q < 0.05). OR range: 0.656–1.351.
output: List of triggered L1 factors (0 to 44 possible)

description: System checks all 29 composite-pattern warning factors (fold 0 training-partition estimate). Source: NB04 group-filtered, risky-specific association rules (confidence >= 0.75, lift >= 2.0x).
trigger: Firm simultaneously satisfies all antecedent bin conditions
output: List of triggered L2 rules (0 to 29 possible)

description: If any L1 or L2 factor is triggered, system displays warning to evaluator.
trigger: One or more factors triggered in L1 or L2
output: Warning panel shown to evaluator before override is finalised

description: No factors triggered. Override proceeds without system intervention.
trigger: Zero factors triggered in both L1 and L2

description: Evaluator reviews triggered warnings; warning is advisory only.
output: Final grade recorded; warning response logged

description: NB03 univariate Firth logistic regression on fold 0 training partition
Firth FDR q < 0.05 (Benjamini-Hochberg), after exact-duplicate removal
Distress tertile computed on fold 0 training partition.
NB04 group-filtered, risky-specific association rules, fold 0 training partition
confidence >= 0.75 AND lift_vs_baseline >= 2.0x, applied to rules already surviving NB04's group-redundancy filter
